title: An Act authorizing the town of Provincetown to designate a check-off box on its municipal tax bills or motor vehicle excise tax bills for the town's Coastal Resilience Fund

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Luddy of Orleans and Senator Cyr, a joint petition (subject to Joint Rule 12) of Hadley Luddy (by vote of the town) that the town of Provincetown be authorized to designate a check-off box on its municipal tax bills or motor vehicle excise tax bills for the coastal resilience fund in said town.  Revenue.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on House Rules
